items.title: French Defense: Advance with the Milner-Barry Trap
items.summary: Build the French Advance structure, finish development with purpose, and punish Black's greedy ...Nxd4? idea with a clean tactical shot.

items.title: Ruy Lopez: Classical Defense
items.summary: Master the Ruy Lopez Classical, where White develops naturally and prepares to break through Black's solid but passive setup.

items.title: Italian Game: Giuoco Piano
items.summary: Learn the peaceful Italian Game where both sides develop harmoniously, but White seeks a small edge through central control.

items.title: Sicilian Defense: Open Sicilian
items.summary: Enter the dynamic world of the Sicilian, where Black fights for equality with pawn sacrifices and counterplay.

items.title: Queen's Gambit Declined: Main Line
items.summary: Learn the solid Queen's Gambit Declined, where Black declines the gambit and fights for equality through central control.

items.title: King's Indian Defense: Classical
items.summary: Enter the dynamic King's Indian, where Black sacrifices pawn structure for piece activity and kingside attack.

items.title: Nimzo-Indian Defense: Classical
items.summary: Learn the Nimzo-Indian, where Black pins and threatens to double White's pawns in exchange for quick development.

items.title: Caro-Kann Defense: Classical
items.summary: Learn the solid Caro-Kann, where Black safely develops and aims to draw White into a positional battle.

items.title: Pirc Defense: Classical
items.summary: Learn the dynamic Pirc Defense, where Black allows White to build a center then attacks it with piece play.

items.title: English Opening: Symmetrical
items.summary: Learn the English Opening, where White avoids main line theory and plays for a positional edge.

items.title: Dutch Defense: Leningrad
items.summary: Learn the aggressive Dutch Defense, where Black fights for kingside space and attack.

items.title: Scandinavian Defense: Modern
items.summary: Learn the aggressive Scandinavian where Black captures and holds the center, creating unique tactical opportunities.

items.title: Alekhine's Defense: Four Pawns Attack
items.summary: Learn the aggressive Four Pawns Attack where White builds a large center then crashes through.

items.title: Modern Defense: Pterodactyl
items.summary: Learn the Modern Defense with the Pterodactyl, where Black creates an unusual pawn structure for dynamic play.

items.title: Benoni Defense: Modern
items.summary: Learn the Benoni, where Black gives up central space for queenside pawn play and piece activity.

items.title: Nimzowitsch Defense: Classical
items.summary: Learn the Nimzowitsch Defense, a hypermodern opening where Black puts a knight on the fourth rank early.

items.title: Sicilian Defense: Najdorf Variation
items.summary: Master the aggressive Najdorf, where Black creates a powerful kingside attack at the cost of pawn structure weaknesses.

items.title: Sicilian Defense: Dragon Variation
items.summary: Enter the Dragon, where Black builds a massive pawn storm on the kingside while White attacks on the queenside.

items.title: Ruy Lopez: Marshall Attack
items.summary: Learn the Marshall Attack, a dangerous theoretical weapon where Black sacrifices a pawn for devastating counterplay.

items.title: Ruy Lopez: Berlin Defense
items.summary: Master the solid Berlin Defense, where Black simplifies into an endgame with active piece play.

items.title: King's Indian Defense: Four Pawns Attack
items.summary: Play the aggressive Four Pawns Attack against the King's Indian, building a large center for a direct assault.

items.title: Queen's Gambit Declined: Slav Defense
items.summary: Learn the solid Slav Defense, where Black declines the gambit and creates a firm pawn structure.

items.title: Nimzo-Indian Defense: Sämisch Variation
items.summary: Master the Sämisch where White allows the pin and accepts doubled pawns for central control.

items.title: Grünfeld Defense: Exchange Variation
items.summary: Enter the Grünfeld Exchange, where White challenges Black's center directly with pawns.

items.title: Catalan Opening: Closed Variation
items.summary: Learn the strategic Catalan, where White plays a reversed Benoni for a small but lasting advantage.

items.title: London System: Standard Setup
items.summary: Master the reliable London System, a flexible setup that avoids theory and plays solid chess.

items.title: Queen's Indian Defense: Classical
items.summary: Learn the Queen's Indian Defense, where Black fights White's central pawn with piece pressure.

items.title: Benko Gambit: Accepted
items.summary: Explore the Benko Gambit, where Black sacrifices a pawn for queenside pressure and piece activity.

items.title: Tactics: Discovered Attacks
items.summary: Master the art of discovered attacks - one of the most powerful tactical weapons in chess.

items.title: Tactics: Double Attacks
items.summary: Learn to attack two objectives at once - a fundamental tactical pattern that wins material.

items.title: Tactics: Pins and Skewers
items.summary: Master the art of pinning - immobilize enemy pieces and win material.

items.title: Tactics: Back Rank Mate
items.summary: The most common checkmate pattern - trap the enemy king on the back rank.

items.title: Tactics: Deflection and Decoys
items.summary: Learn to lure enemy pieces away from their critical squares.

items.title: Tactics: Removal of the Guard
items.summary: Learn to remove the defender and capture protected pieces.

items.title: Tactics: Zwischenzug
items.summary: Master the powerful Zwischenzug - inserting a threat before the expected recapture.

items.title: Tactics: Desperado
items.summary: Learn to sacrifice by moving as if you're already lost - but winning.

items.title: Tactics: Overloading
items.summary: Make your opponent's piece do too much - then exploit it.

items.title: Tactics: Attraction and Trapping
items.summary: Lure enemy pieces to squares where they can be trapped or attacked.

items.title: Tactics: X-Ray Attack
items.summary: Attack through pieces - the hidden X-Ray attack.

items.title: Tactics: Interference
items.summary: Break the connection between enemy pieces with interference.

items.title: Tactics: Clearance
items.summary: Clear the path for your pieces to attack.

items.title: Tactics: Trapping a Piece
items.summary: Learn to trap opponent's pieces and win material.

items.title: Tactics: Pawn Breaks
items.summary: Use pawn breaks to open lines and create tactical opportunities.

items.title: Tactics: Double Check
items.summary: The most powerful check - delivering check from two directions at once.

items.title: Tactics: Sacrificial Mates
items.summary: Give up material to deliver checkmate - the GM specialty.

items.title: Tactics: Rook Endgame Patterns
items.summary: Essential rook endgame tactical patterns every player must know.

items.title: Tactics: Advanced Pawn Play
items.summary: Master pawn tactics: promotion, breakthroughs, and underpromotion.

items.title: Tactics: Hindering
items.summary: Stop your opponent from castling or developing.
